headline: The Longevity Economy: Why Healthcare REITs Are in Focus
summary: Ventas highlights how aging demographics are boosting healthcare REIT demand, with senior housing occupancy growth and limited supply supporting long-term growth.

headline: Zillow Inks Multiyear Partnership With MLB, Boosts Brand Visibility
